en_definition: one part of a story that is broadcast on television or radio in several parts
zh_definition: （电视连续剧或广播剧的）一集

en_definition: a set of radio or television programmes that deal with the same subject or that have the same characters
zh_definition: （广播或电视上题材或角色相同的）系列节目

en_definition: happening or existing before the event or object that you are talking about
using few words
lasting only a short time; short
a group of words or a short piece of writing taken from a book, play, speech, etc.
to repeat the exact words that another person has said or written
to hit your open hands together
to hit your open hands together several times to show that you approve of or have enjoyed something
zh_definition: 鼓掌，拍手（表示赞许或欣赏）

en_definition: used to emphasize a positive statement or answer
used to add information to a statement
directed at dealing with something or producing a successful result
zh_definition: 积极的；建设性的；朝着成功的

en_definition: a change that somebody / something causes in somebody / something else
how well or badly you do something
the act of performing a play, concert or some other form of entertainment
to suggest a plan, an idea, etc. for people to think about and decide on
a talk or a lesson in schools
zh_definition: （通常指大学里的）讲座，讲课，演讲

en_definition: an official paper or book that gives information about something, or that can be used as evidence or proof of something
something, especially a book, equipment, etc. that provides information
very interested and excited by something that is going to happen or about something that you want to do
often
to make something more modern by adding new parts, etc.
used to state what the result would be if something did not happen or if the situation were different
to make somebody want to do something, especially something that involves hard work and effort
the way a group of people feel about something; the atmosphere in a place or among a group of people
the group of people who have gathered to watch or listen to something (a play, a concert, somebody speaking, etc.)
zh_definition: （戏剧、音乐会或演讲等的）观众，听众

en_definition: a violent storm with very strong winds, especially in the western Atlantic Ocean
a way or track
an area of Britain, Ireland or the US that has its own government
an area of low land between hills or mountains, often with a river flowing through it; the land that a river flows through
an unpleasant event, especially in a vehicle, that happens unexpectedly and causes injury or damage
zh_definition: （交通）事故；意外遭遇；不测事件

en_definition: to admit or to be aware that something exists or is true
to know who somebody is or what something is when you see or hear them or it, because you have seen or heard them or it before
help that is given to a person
to work in the correct way
to give money, food, clothes, etc. to somebody / something, especially a charity
an amount of something that is provided or available to be used
having great love for somebody / something and being loyal to them
zh_definition: 挚爱的；忠诚的；全心全意的

en_definition: involving the use of skill and the imagination to produce something new or a work of art
the good feeling that you have when you have achieved something
an advantage or profit gained from something
the ability to direct all your effort and attention on one thing, without thinking of other things
used to say that a particular situation or fact is easy to see or understand
zh_definition: （用于说明某种情况或事实）明显，显而易见，不言而喻

en_definition: to help something to happen or develop
the act of doing something together or working together towards a shared aim
connected with or happening in mind; involving the process of thinking
zh_definition: 思想的；精神的；思考的；智力的

en_definition: connected with education, especially studying in schools and universities
a way of doing something, especially the usual or correct way
knowing or realizing something
spending all your free time doing something because you are so interested in it
to discuss something, especially formally, before making a decision or finding a solution
an argument or discussion expressing different opinions
zh_definition: （各自发表不同意见的）争论，辩论

en_definition: the special set of clothes worn by all members of an organization or a group at work, or by children at school
the characteristics, feelings or beliefs that distinguish people from others
who or what somebody / something is
to be a sign that something exists or is likely to happen
to give a summary of something (= a statement of the main points)
to learn or understand something completely
to stop somebody from doing something; to stop something from happening
a medicine or medical treatment that cures an illness
a serious disease in which growths of cells, also called cancers, form in the body and kill normal body cells
a system for sending data over computer networks using radio waves instead of wires
(of a boat or ship or the people on it) to travel on water using sails or an engine
very strict and firm
held or fixed in position firmly; difficult to move or undo
sea
to do something or try to achieve something over a period of time
a small group of musicians who play rock music together, often with a singer or singers
having control over somebody / something; being responsible for somebody / something
to summarize
(of a person) to become very weak or ill and die
